final_answer:
Bridge contracts have nothing to do with this task; I brought them in by mistake while checking whether reward weight reached an old payout path.

The only valid scope here is the chain-side consensus code: `x/pricefeed`, `x/stake`, app wiring, and generated proto/API outputs under the consensus client. The word `bridge` appeared because this repo stores that consensus client under a `bridge/gilt-consensus` directory, but that does not mean the bridge subsystem or `pos-contracts` were part of the task.

Why it matters: checking unrelated bridge contract code made the review look like scope creep and confused the actual implementation boundary.

Next: I should redo the read-only gap report strictly on the files touched by this task, excluding bridge contracts/listeners/processors unless you explicitly ask for them.
